message:
test(unit): expand wait.rs with 970+ lines of backoff, retry, and detector coverage (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Comprehensive inline unit test expansion for the wait module, covering
backoff strategies, retry logic, activity detection, and metric
collection edge cases.

Backoff edge cases (12 tests):
- factor=1 stays constant, factor=0 always returns zero duration,
  initial=0 stays zero regardless of factor, max=initial caps
  immediately, large factor clamps to max without overflow,
  very large initial that would overflow on multiply still clamps
  to max, factor=u32::MAX with tiny initial still converges to max,
  max_retries=Some(0) exhausts immediately, max_retries=Some(1) allows
  exactly one retry, reset clears retry count and returns to initial,
  successive resets are idempotent, mixed advance/reset interleaving.

WaitCondition construction and matching (8 tests):
- Pattern matching against exact text, regex pattern, timeout
  expiration, negated condition inversion, compound AND/OR
  conditions, nested compound conditions, empty compound returns
  vacuous truth (AND) / false (OR), Debug and Clone derivations.

RetryPolicy behavior (7 tests):
- Immediate retry with no backoff, linear backoff progression,
  exponential backoff with cap, retry budget enforcement (max
  attempts), budget exhaustion returns None for next delay,
  with_jitter bounds verification, retry context tracks attempt
  count and elapsed time.

ActivityDetector state transitions (8 tests):
- Idle-to-active transition on first event, active-to-quiet after
  timeout, quiet-to-active on resume, rapid events maintain active
  state, concurrent pane tracking independence, detector reset clears
  all pane state, quiet threshold edge (exactly at boundary),
  timestamp ordering invariant (monotonic progression).

MetricBucket aggregation (6 tests):
- Single observation min/max/mean identity, multiple observations
  correct aggregation, empty bucket returns None for all stats,
  bucket merge combines counts and adjusts min/max, reset returns
  empty bucket, large observation count doesn't overflow.

Also fixed two prop_assert! format string issues where implicit
captures ({final_val}, {desc}) were replaced with explicit positional
arguments per the Rust 2024 edition prop_assert! macro requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
